Home.heading: Project ready!
Home.body1: You may now add components and start building.
Home.body2: We've already added the button component for you.

cookieConsent.title: Essential storage is active.
cookieConsent.description: Afenda currently uses essential storage only. Accept or reject records that you reviewed this notice. Essential storage remains required for sign-in, locale continuity, security, and interface preferences.
cookieConsent.acceptedState: Saved in this browser: accepted. Essential storage remains active.
cookieConsent.rejectedState: Saved in this browser: rejected. No non-essential categories are active.
cookieConsent.stateHint: Your selection is stored in this browser so you can revisit the notice later.

Auth.infoOtpCode: Enter the code we emailed you.
Auth.descriptionStepUp: For your security, sign in again to continue.
Auth.descriptionDefault: Use your email or OAuth — pick what works best.
Auth.stepUpAlertDescription: Sensitive action — confirm it is you before continuing.
Auth.footerLegalConsent: By signing in, signing up, or continuing with a social provider, you agree to our <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms>.
Auth.passwordRequirements: Use at least 8 characters. Avoid passwords you use elsewhere.
Auth.otpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your email. You can paste the full code.

session_expired.title: Session expired
session_expired.description: Sign in again to continue where you left off.
session_expired.descriptionWithContext: Your session ended while you were working. {context}
session_expired.trustNote: Sessions expire after a period of inactivity to protect your organization.

step_up_required.title: Additional verification required
step_up_required.description: For your security, sign in again to continue this sensitive action.
step_up_required.trustNote: Step-up verification helps ensure only you can change critical settings.

mfa_required.title: Multi-factor authentication required
mfa_required.description: Your organization requires a second factor. Complete sign-in to continue.
mfa_required.trustNote: MFA reduces the risk of unauthorized access to your workspace.

email_unverified.title: Verify your email
email_unverified.description: Confirm your email address before continuing. Check your inbox for a verification link.
email_unverified.trustNote: Unverified accounts cannot access some ERP features for security reasons.

org_required.title: Workspace setup needed
org_required.description: Create or join an organization to open the dashboard.
org_required.trustNote: Your account must belong to an active workspace before ERP modules are available.

invitation_expired.title: Invitation no longer valid
invitation_expired.description: This invitation has expired or was revoked. Ask your administrator for a new invite.

rate_limited.title: Too many attempts
rate_limited.description: Try again in a few minutes. If you need access urgently, contact your administrator.
rate_limited.trustNote: Rate limits protect accounts from automated attacks.

sign_in_failed.title: Sign-in could not complete
sign_in_failed.description: Check your credentials and try again. If the problem continues, use another sign-in method or reset your password.

unknown_failure.title: Something went wrong
unknown_failure.description: We could not complete that request. Sign in again or return home.

navPanel.title: Workspace navigation
navPanel.description: Move through modules and governance surfaces without leaving the current workspace.

controlMenu.triggerTooltip: Account and workspace — open personal settings, information, security, switch organization, open admin, customize the utility bar, or sign out.

notifications.triggerUnread: Notifications. {count, plural, one {# unread notice} other {# unread notices}}
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Organization-wide notices from admins and governed system emitters.
notifications.emptyDescription: Broadcast notices from admins and system workflows will appear here.
notifications.detailEmptyDescription: Choose a notice from the list to review details and take action.
notifications.createDescription: Broadcast a governed organization notice to all current operators.

errors.createFailed: Couldn't publish the notice. Try again.

diagnosis.title: Network diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Live browser-to-origin probe against this workspace.
diagnosis.idle: Open this utility to run a live connectivity check.
diagnosis.errorOffline: Browser is offline. Restore connectivity and try again.

feedback.title: Share feedback
feedback.description: Tell the Afenda team what you noticed.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What did you notice? Steps to reproduce help.

storage.title: Browser storage
storage.description: Current browser storage availability and Afenda-facing keys on this device.

upload.tooltip: Upload a file into the current workspace
upload.title: Upload
upload.description: Send one file into the current workspace's governed blob intake.
upload.acceptedTypes: Accepted: JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF.
upload.successDescription: {fileName} is now available in blob storage for this workspace.

screenshot.title: Screenshot
screenshot.description: Capture the current workspace or content view, then upload one governed PNG.
screenshot.emptyState: Capture the current view to review it before upload.
screenshot.successDescription: The PNG is now available in blob storage for this workspace.
screenshot.errorTargetMissing: The selected capture area is not available on this screen.

messenger.title: Operational coordination
messenger.description: Coordinate around operational work, evidence, and review trails without leaving the workspace.
messenger.emptyContexts: No coordination contexts yet. Start one when work needs shared review, evidence, or follow-up.
messenger.unlinkedContext: This context is not linked to an operational record yet.
messenger.emptyActivity: No activity yet. Add a coordination update or evidence to start the trail.
messenger.composerPlaceholder: Summarize the situation, the decision needed, or the evidence that matters.
messenger.selectContext: Select an operational context to review coordination and evidence.
messenger.newContextDescription: Create a coordination context for the operators who need to review or act together.
messenger.startNotePlaceholder: Optional: summarize the issue, decision, or handoff needed.
messenger.noOperators: No operators available in this organization.

errors.captureTarget: The workspace capture area is not available on this screen.
errors.captureFailed: Screenshot evidence capture failed. Try again.
errors.sendFailed: Couldn't send the coordination update. Try again.

customize.title: Utility bar
customize.description: Show or hide controls on the right rail. Left rail (workspace navigation) and identity menu always stay visible.
customize.capReached: Maximum reached. Turn one off to show another.

messenger.title: Messenger
messenger.body: Reserved for org conversations — wiring comes next.

commandPalette.dialogDescription: Search modules, organizations, or admin actions.

Orbit.title: Orbit
Orbit.description: Operational execution substrate for signals, ranked work, timelines, links, and sessions.

queue.label: Queue
queue.title: Orbit Queue
queue.description: Ranked operational work requiring execution now.

today.label: Today
today.title: Orbit Today
today.description: Scheduled and active operational work for the current day.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.title: Orbit Timeline
timeline.description: Upcoming, overdue, and scheduled pressure across the execution horizon.

signals.label: Signals
signals.title: Orbit Signals
signals.description: Detected operational pressure awaiting triage, suppression, or promotion.

sessions.label: Sessions
sessions.title: Orbit Sessions
sessions.description: Active and recent execution sessions with worklog continuity.

links.label: Links
links.title: Orbit Links
links.description: ERP-linked execution objects grouped by business truth.

panels.emptyDescription: Orbit is ready. Capture a signal or create an execution item to start building operational continuity.
panels.detailEmptyDescription: Choose a signal, item, session, or link to inspect operational context, pressure, and temporal evidence.

status.invalidInput: Orbit could not process that request.

shell.title: Human resources
shell.description: Workforce records, leave, attendance, payroll preparation, and compliance evidence — governed through Server Actions and the IAM audit ledger.
shell.registryHintBody: Routes, audit prefixes, and navigation keys are driven by HRM_CAPABILITIES in code. Add or change capabilities there first, then update catalogs and contract tests.

employees.title: Workforce
employees.description: Employee master data, employment contracts, and organization structure.

leave.title: Leave
leave.description: Leave types, entitlement, requests, and approvals.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Attendance events, daily aggregates, and corrections.

claims.title: Claims
claims.description: Reimbursable claims with evidence — approved unpaid claims feed the next payroll period.

payroll.title: Payroll preparation
payroll.description: Pay periods, runs, statutory previews — evidence before disbursement.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: HR documents with hashed evidence trails.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: Policy versions bound to workforce execution.

snapshot.title: HR snapshot
snapshot.description: Read-only projection of HR operational truth — ships after core workflows.

employees.title: Workforce
employees.body: Employee master records are available under Workforce (Phase 1A). Employment contracts and payroll profiles ship in Phase 1B; the IAM audit timeline lands in Phase 1C.

leave.title: Leave
leave.body: Phase 2 ships entitlement engine, requests, and manager approval.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.body: Phase 2C adds attendance events, daily aggregates, and CSV import.

claims.title: Claims
claims.body: Phase 4 ships reimbursable claims — submit with evidence, single-step approval, paid through the next payroll period.

payroll.title: Payroll preparation
payroll.body: Phase 3 delivers payroll periods, preview lines, Malaysia rule packs, and golden statutory tests.

compliance.title: Compliance evidence
compliance.body: Phase 3C exposes statutory packs and signed outbound delivery.

documents.title: Documents
documents.body: Phase 1B attaches employment documents through governed uploads.

policies.title: Policies
policies.body: Policy-bound execution expands after leave and payroll foundations land.

snapshot.title: HR snapshot
snapshot.body: Dashboard projection builds last from real workflow metrics — not Phase 0.

workforce.pageDescription: Create and maintain employee master records. Mutations write to the IAM audit ledger.
workforce.dialogDescription: Creates a workforce master record and writes an IAM audit event.
workforce.directoryDescription: Open a row for details, edits, or archival.
workforce.empty: No employees yet. Create your first record to get started.
workforce.detailDescription: Workforce master data plus Phase 1B employment contracts, payroll profiles, and governed document uploads.
workforce.summarySectionDescription: Identifiers and contact fields stored on the master row.
workforce.archiveDescription: Archiving prevents further edits. The row stays for audit and timeline coverage.
workforce.contractSectionDescription: Draft a contract, attach a signed document, then activate. Only one active row is allowed per employee.
workforce.payrollSectionDescription: Statutory identifiers and pay preferences — effective-dated rows with one open profile per employee.
workforce.payrollNoProfile: No payroll profile yet — submit to create the first row.
workforce.documentSectionDescription: Upload through governed Blob paths; SHA-256 hash is recorded with the vault row.
workforce.documentUploadHint: PDF or images only (same limits as Nexus utility uploads). Hash is computed in the browser before upload.
workforce.timelineDescription: IAM audit events for this employee (production ledger): master data, contracts, payroll profiles, and governed documents.
workforce.timelineEmpty: No audit events recorded for this employee yet.

leavePolicy.pageDescription: Leave types, entitlement engine, and policy configuration — governed through Server Actions and the IAM audit ledger.
leavePolicy.seedMalaysiaEaSuccess: Malaysia EA 2023 leave types seeded successfully.
leavePolicy.seedMalaysiaEaSkipped: {count, plural, one {# type} other {# types}} already existed.

entitlementBasis.annual_grant: Annual grant ({years, plural, one {# year} other {# years}} service)

leaveRequest.pageDescription: Employee leave applications, balance tracking, and approval workflow.
leaveRequest.errorOverlap: Leave dates overlap with an existing active request.
leaveRequest.errorArchivedEmployee: Cannot submit leave for an archived employee.
leaveRequest.approvalSnapshotDescription: This is what the approver saw when the decision was made. It is preserved even if the underlying record changes.

attendance.pageDescription: Clock events, daily summaries, and corrections.

recordEvent.title: Record attendance event
recordEvent.error: Failed to record attendance event. Please try again.

correctEvent.title: Correct attendance event
correctEvent.description: A correction creates a new event that supersedes the original. The original record is preserved for audit.
correctEvent.error: Failed to save correction. Please try again.

regenerateDay.title: Regenerate day summary
regenerateDay.description: Recomputes the daily aggregate from raw events. Idempotent — no changes if events are unchanged.
regenerateDay.error: Failed to regenerate. Please try again.

csvImport.title: Import attendance events
csvImport.description: Upload a CSV with columns: employee_id, event_type, occurred_at. Optional: correction_of_event_id, correction_reason, device_id.

attendance.emptyEvents: No attendance events for this date.
attendance.emptyDays: No attendance records in this range.

payroll.pageDescription: Create pay periods, preview gross-to-net runs, and answer the seven traceability questions before locking.
payroll.createPeriodDescription: Defines the date window and payment date for a monthly cycle. Runs compute via a durable workflow using the pinned Malaysia rule pack when the profile country is MY.
payroll.noPeriods: No payroll periods yet. Open the first period above.
payroll.noRuns: No runs yet. Click Prepare runs to stage employee computations.
payroll.lockWorkflowHint: When every run is computed without validation blockers and attendance days in-range are computed or locked, request lock certification. After approval, lock pins the MY rule-pack version and freezes runs plus attendance rows in this window.
payroll.lockApprovalRequested: Certification requested — another admin can approve.
payroll.periodLocked: Period locked — rule pack version pinned.
payroll.lockMyrOnly: Period lock is enabled for MYR payroll only until additional country packs ship.

claims.pageDescription: Reimbursable claims with evidence. Approved unpaid claims roll into the next payroll period as ALLOWANCE_CLAIM lines.
claims.memberRestrictedBody: Submitting and approving claims is limited to organization admins until self-service ships. Ask an admin to record this claim on your behalf.
claims.noEmployeesBody: Add employee records under Workforce before submitting a claim on their behalf.
claims.noClaimTypesBody: Create at least one active claim type (TRAVEL, MEDICAL, …) before claims can be submitted.
claims.submitDialogTitle: Submit a claim on behalf of an employee
claims.submitDialogDescription: Creates a pending approval. The amount and per-claim limit are checked at submission and the approval snapshot is immutable.
claims.fieldClaimDateHint: Date the expense was incurred. Cannot be in the future.

kanban.title: Claims kanban
kanban.description: Live state of claims by lifecycle column. Numbers reflect the current organization only.

claims.inboxDescription: Submitted claims awaiting a decision. Approving a claim makes it eligible for the next payroll period.
claims.inboxEmpty: No pending claim approvals — the inbox is clear.
claims.inboxLoadFailed: Pending approvals are temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.
claims.recentDescription: Most recent claims across the organization. Read-only audit trail.
claims.recentEmpty: No claim activity yet. Submit a claim to populate the audit trail.
claims.recentLoadFailed: Recent activity is temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.
claims.evidenceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No evidence} one {1 file} other {# files}}
claims.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Required — visible to the requester and approver
claims.decisionNotePlaceholder: Optional context recorded with the audit event

payrollPreview.title: Approved unpaid claims for this period
payrollPreview.description: These claims will roll into the payroll period as ALLOWANCE_CLAIM earnings when the period is locked.
payrollPreview.empty: No approved unpaid claims fall within this period.
payrollPreview.loadFailed: Claims preview is temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.

leave.pageDescription: Apply for leave on behalf of an employee, review pending approvals, and audit recent decisions. All mutations write to the IAM ledger.
leave.memberRestrictedBody: Leave application and approval are limited to organization admins until employee self-service ships. Ask an admin to record this leave on your behalf.
leave.applyDialogTitle: Apply leave on behalf of an employee
leave.applyDialogDescription: Submits a leave request and creates a pending approval. The current balance is checked before submission and the approval snapshot is immutable.
leave.fieldDurationHint: Whole days for full-day leave; the form locks to 0.5 when a half-day is selected.
leave.noEmployeesBody: Add employee records under Workforce before submitting leave on their behalf.
leave.noLeaveTypesBody: Seed Malaysia EA 2023 defaults or create your own leave types from the policies workbench (admin) before applying.

errors.balanceShort: Insufficient balance for the selected leave type and year.
errors.overlap: Selected dates overlap an existing active request.
errors.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.

leave.inboxDescription: Submitted requests waiting on a decision. Acting on a row writes an audit event and recomputes the leave balance.
leave.inboxEmpty: No pending leave approvals — the inbox is clear.
leave.inboxLoadFailed: Pending approvals are temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.
leave.recentDescription: Latest 50 leave requests across the organization. Read-only audit trail.
leave.recentEmpty: No leave activity yet. Submit a request to populate the audit trail.
leave.recentLoadFailed: Recent activity is temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.
leave.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Required — visible to the requester and approver
leave.decisionNotePlaceholder: Optional context recorded with the audit event

attendance.pageDescription: Record clock-in / clock-out / break events, correct mistakes with an immutable audit trail, and force-regenerate the day aggregate that feeds payroll. All mutations write to the IAM ledger.
attendance.memberRestrictedBody: Recording, correcting, and regenerating attendance days are limited to organization admins until employee self-service ships. Ask an admin to make these changes for you.
attendance.noEmployeesBody: Add employee records under Workforce before recording attendance events on their behalf.
attendance.recordDialogDescription: Inserts a single manual event for an employee, then re-aggregates the day. Use this for missed punches, badge failures, or onboarding bridges. The day aggregate is recomputed deterministically.
attendance.fieldOccurredAtHint: Local time. The day aggregate uses the same UTC date the event lands on.
attendance.fieldCorrectionReasonPlaceholder: Required — visible on the audit trail (minimum 3 characters)
attendance.recentDescription: Latest 50 raw attendance events across the organization (newest first). Corrections are inserted as new rows pointing back to the original — the original is never mutated.
attendance.recentEmpty: No attendance events yet. Use Record event to populate the audit trail.
attendance.recentLoadFailed: Recent events are temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.
attendance.correctDialogDescription: Inserts a new correction event pointing to the original. The original row stays in the database and the day aggregate is recomputed deterministically. Locked days cannot be corrected.
attendance.daySummaryDescription: Per-employee, per-date aggregate computed from raw events. The aggregator is idempotent — regenerating with no new events is a no-op.
attendance.daySummaryEmpty: No aggregate computed for this employee on the selected date yet.
attendance.daySummaryEmptyHint: Record an event or click Regenerate to compute the day from existing raw events.
attendance.daySummaryLoadFailed: Day summary is temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.
attendance.daySelectorMissing: Pick an employee + date to load the day aggregate.
attendance.regenerateConfirmDescription: Recomputes the day aggregate from current raw events. Idempotent — if the event checksum is unchanged, no DB write occurs.
attendance.regenerateSkipped: No changes — the day aggregate is already in sync with the raw events.
attendance.regenerateFailedLocked: Locked days cannot be regenerated. Unlock the payroll period first.

documents.pageDescription: Library view of every HR document attached to this organization. Each row preserves the canonical sha-256 payload hash and the IAM audit row that recorded the upload. Attach new documents from the employee detail page so the governed Vercel Blob path is enforced.
documents.memberRestrictedBody: Members can browse documents linked to themselves once Portals ships. For now, ask an org admin to share the document hash from the employee detail page.
documents.libraryDescription: Newest upload first across the whole organization. Filters narrow by document type, classification, and employee. Open a row to download the original from the governed Blob path.
documents.filterDescription: Combine filters to narrow the library. Reset clears every filter and returns to the most recent uploads.
documents.noDocumentsBody: Upload an employment document from an employee detail page. The governed Blob path enforces tenant isolation and the IAM audit ledger captures every upload.
documents.filteredEmptyBody: Reset the filters to see the most recent uploads, or pick a different document type / employee.
documents.libraryLoadFailed: The document library is temporarily unavailable. Retry shortly.

policies.pageDescription: Configure leave types, policy overlays, and the active rule pack for the organization. Holiday calendars, working patterns, and the rule-pack inspector ship in Phase 4. All mutations are admin-gated and audited as erp.hrm.leave_type.* / erp.hrm.policy.*.
policies.memberRestrictedBody: Editing leave types, policy overlays, and rule packs is limited to organization admins. Members can review the active configuration on the leave management page.

leaveTypes.title: Leave types
leaveTypes.description: Per-org catalog of leave types. Seed Malaysia EA 2023 defaults to bootstrap a new org, then adjust tier days or carry-forward as needed. Codes must be uppercase and unique per organization.
leaveTypes.createDialogDescription: Defines a new leave-type row in the org catalog. The accrual method determines whether tier days or a fixed yearly allowance applies. The audit trail records erp.hrm.leave_type.create.
leaveTypes.editDialogDescription: Updates the catalog row in place. Existing balances and historical leave requests are not affected; the immutable approval snapshot preserves the values that were active at submission time.
leaveTypes.seedDialogDescription: Idempotently inserts the canonical Annual / Sick / Hospital / Maternity / Paternity rows from the Employment Act 2023. Existing types with the same code are skipped — re-running this is safe.
leaveTypes.seedSummaryEmpty: All EA 2023 default leave types are already present.
leaveTypes.seedSummarySuccess: Seeded {seeded, plural, one {# leave type} other {# leave types}}.
leaveTypes.seedSummarySkipped: Skipped {skipped, plural, one {# existing type} other {# existing types}}.
leaveTypes.seedFailed: Could not seed Malaysia EA 2023 defaults.
leaveTypes.noTypesBody: Seed the Malaysia EA 2023 defaults or create your first leave type to populate the leave-balance engine.
leaveTypes.tierLabel: {years}+ yrs: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
leaveTypes.fixedDaysLabel: {days, plural, one {# day / yr} other {# days / yr}}
leaveTypes.carryForwardExpiry: (expires after {months, plural, one {# month} other {# months}})
leaveTypes.totalCount: {count, plural, one {# leave type} other {# leave types}}

leaveType.fieldCodeHint: Uppercase letters, digits, and underscores only (e.g. ANNUAL, COMPASSIONATE).
leaveType.tierHint: Required when accrual method is Annual grant. Up to 3 tiers; the last tier covers everyone above tier 2's max years.
leaveType.fixedDaysHint: Required when accrual method is Fixed grant.

comingSoon.holidaysBody: Per-country holiday calendars (Malaysia 2026 baseline) ship with the rule-pack inspector in Phase 4. Holidays already drive working-day calculations in the leave engine; this surface adds operator-facing import and overrides.
comingSoon.workingPatternBody: Org-wide and team-level working patterns (5-day, 6-day, shift rotations) ship with attendance Phase 3. The leave engine already accepts a per-contract working pattern; this surface exposes the editor.
comingSoon.statutoryBody: Read-only inspector for the active rule-pack version (EPF / SOCSO / EIS / PCB). Ships once Phase 3B golden tests are green so operators can verify the rule pack pinned against each payroll run.

compliance.pageDescription: Generate, review, and track submission of statutory packs for EPF, SOCSO, EIS, PCB, and annual EA / Borang E.
compliance.title: Statutory evidence register
compliance.description: Packs are generated from locked payroll runs and pinned to the active rule-pack version.
compliance.periodSelectorDescription: Select a period to view its statutory evidence packs.
compliance.emptyNoPeriod: Select a payroll period to view its evidence packs.
compliance.emptyFinalizePeriod: No packs generated yet. Lock the period and generate evidence to begin.
compliance.requireLockedPeriod: Lock the payroll period to enable statutory pack generation.
compliance.generatedSummary: Generated {count, plural, one {# pack} other {# packs}} (rule pack {version}).
compliance.markAcknowledgedAria: Mark {pack} as acknowledged by the bureau
compliance.acknowledgementHashTooltip: Bureau payload hash (sha-256, first 8 of 64 hex chars)

timeline.title: Lifecycle timeline
timeline.description: Chronological record of generation, submission, delivery, retry, and acknowledgement events for this evidence row.
timeline.detailDescription: Per-evidence operational chronology — generation, submission, delivery diagnostics, retries, and bureau acknowledgement.
timeline.summaryDescription: Identity and integrity facts for this evidence row.

export.label: Download
export.description: Operator-friendly export — re-derived deterministically and audited as erp.hrm.compliance_pack.export. The response carries an X-Afenda-Pack-Hash anchor so an offline reviewer can prove the file was not modified in transit. Bureau-spec submission files (KWSP / PERKESO / LHDN column orders) ship per rule pack later.

operationalHealth.title: Operational health
operationalHealth.description: What needs HR attention across all periods this week.
operationalHealth.emptyNoRows: No statutory evidence has been generated yet. Lock a payroll period and generate packs to begin.
operationalHealth.allClearBody: Every recent statutory pack is in flight or acknowledged. No HR action required.
operationalHealth.countersAria: Compliance evidence counts by operational state
operationalHealth.samplesTruncated: {remainder, plural, one {+# more not shown} other {+# more not shown}}
operationalHealth.footerWindowFull: based on the full evidence history ({window} rows)
operationalHealth.footerWindowClamped: based on the most recent {window} evidence rows

bucketHeading.needs_attention_failing: {count, plural, one {# evidence pack failing delivery} other {# evidence packs failing delivery}}
bucketHeading.needs_attention_stuck: {count, plural, one {# pack waiting on bureau acknowledgement} other {# packs waiting on bureau acknowledgement}}
bucketHeading.needs_attention_unsent: {count, plural, one {# generated pack still unsent for a locked period} other {# generated packs still unsent for locked periods}}

bucketSubtitle.needs_attention_failing: Outbound delivery returned a non-2xx response or auto-retry has exhausted its attempts. HR action required.
bucketSubtitle.needs_attention_stuck: Submitted to the bureau but no acknowledgement yet after {stuckDays}+ days. Follow up with the bureau.
bucketSubtitle.needs_attention_unsent: Generated against a locked period but never sent. Send to bureau now.

bureauReliability.title: Bureau reliability
bureauReliability.description: Per-authority delivery and acknowledgement health over the last {windowDays} days.
bureauReliability.emptyNoData: No statutory submissions in the window. Generate and send packs to begin tracking bureau reliability.
bureauReliability.footer: Snapshot at {computedAt} — {rowsConsidered} submissions evaluated over {windowDays} days.

surfaceComingSoon.emptyTitle: This surface is not available yet

accounting.description: Ledger posting, reconciliation, and period controls are planned for a future release.
accounting.detail: You can keep working in live surfaces from the Nexus field; we will ship accounting workflows when the data model and posting rules are ready.

sale.description: Quotations, orders, and billing flows are planned for a future release.
sale.detail: Use Orbit and Contacts for operational work today; structured sale workflows will follow in a future release.

purchase.description: Purchase requests, approvals, and vendor flows are planned for a future release.
purchase.detail: Procurement tooling will connect here once intake and approval semantics are finalized.

inventory.description: Stock moves, on-hand balances, and reservations are planned for a future release.
inventory.detail: Inventory execution will land after core posting surfaces.

Lynx.title: Lynx
Lynx.description: Afenda’s machine layer for resolving truth, preparing work, and recommending controlled action.

operator.sectionDescription: Ask about read-only org facts. Lynx can use governed tools: contact totals and recent contacts, recent knowledge chunks, semantic knowledge search, and active import job counts. Responses stream as they are produced; nothing here changes your data.
operator.placeholderMessage: e.g. How many contacts do we have, and what is in knowledge lately?
operator.errorStream: Could not read the response stream.

truth.sectionDescription: Ask a question. Lynx answers from your organization’s stored knowledge chunks only.
truth.placeholderQuestion: e.g. Why was this return rejected?
truth.errorStream: Could not read the response stream.
truth.evidenceEmpty: No passages retrieved. Add knowledge chunks below.

nlDemo.sectionDescription: Ask in plain English. Lynx generates read-only SQL against the org-scoped demo dataset (`lynx_demo_unicorn`), runs it in Postgres, and suggests a chart. Seed rows first — see AGENTS.md (Lynx NL→SQL demo).
nlDemo.placeholderQuestion: e.g. Average valuation by industry in the United States
nlDemo.chartPending: Chart suggestion unavailable — try a broader question.

substrate.addDescription: Add text chunks with embeddings so Truth retrieval has evidence to draw on.
substrate.searchDescription: Debug retrieval with raw cosine distance — the same substrate Truth retrieval uses.

Knowledge.placeholderBody: Paste or type the text to embed…
Knowledge.placeholderSearch: Describe what you are looking for…

LynxSummon.title: Lynx
LynxSummon.description: Grounded feed for the task in focus — Truth runs automatically; open Knowledge or Lynx for deeper work.
LynxSummon.groundingNoneDescription: Open an item or record and Lynx will ground its feed on it.
LynxSummon.truthIdleNoAtom: Focus an item on the canvas to retrieve grounded truth.
LynxSummon.errorStream: Could not read the response stream.

PlatformAdmin.title: Platform administration
PlatformAdmin.description: Global tools for operators with the admin role. Organization admins use the workspace Admin workbench from the ERP dashboard.
PlatformAdmin.overviewDescription: Cross-tenant capabilities. Tenant-scoped governance lives in the organization Admin workbench.

shell.title: Operator console
shell.subtitle: Global controls for users, organizations, and platform telemetry.

users.title: User directory
users.description: Search, promote, ban, or unban Better Auth users.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Cross-tenant directory with member counts and quick links.

users.title: User directory
users.description: Cross-tenant view of Better Auth users. Role and ban actions are audited as iam.user.*.
users.empty: No users match the current filters.
users.disabledSelf: You can't change your own role or ban yourself.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Every organization on the platform with current member counts.
organizations.empty: No organizations have been created yet.

inboxLabels.members: {count, plural, one {# pending invitation} other {# pending invitations}}
inboxLabels.integrations: {count, plural, one {# integration needs review} other {# integrations need review}}
inboxLabels.audit: {count, plural, one {# audit row to review} other {# audit rows to review}}
inboxLabels.feedback: {count, plural, one {# feedback item} other {# feedback items}}
inboxLabels.settings: {count, plural, one {# setting needs attention} other {# settings need attention}}

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Quick snapshot of membership and shortcuts to governance tools.
overview.membersCardDescription: People with access to this workspace.

members.title: Members & invitations
members.description: Invite colleagues, manage roles, and cancel pending invitations.

audit.title: Organization audit
audit.descriptionLead: IAM events for this organization (actions starting with
audit.descriptionTail: ). Sensitive mutations should appear here after successful writes.

simulation.title: Operational simulation (non-production)
simulation.description: Replay and clear are gated by AFENDA_ENABLE_SIMULATION=1. Writes real rows stamped as simulated.
simulation.clearInvalid: Enter a simulation run id (at least 8 characters).

events.showingShort: Showing {shown} of {total, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}

feedback.title: Operator feedback
feedback.description: Submissions from the utility bar in your workspace. Acknowledge, resolve, or reject each item.
feedback.empty: No feedback submissions for this filter.
feedback.showingShort: Showing {shown} of {total, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}

error.errorNotFound: That feedback entry is missing or was removed.
error.errorInvalidTransition: That action is not allowed for the current state.
error.errorValidation: Check the form and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Workspace administration links. Identity and security stay on your account profile.
settings.accountSecurityDescription: Sessions, passkeys, and verification for your user.
settings.orgProfileDescription: The segment in your organization URLs. Renaming it changes links to this workspace; we may add a short suffix if the name is already taken.
settings.orgProfileHint: You can change the URL slug here. For the organization display name, use your account or future profile fields as the product adds them.

slug.label: URL slug
slug.hintBefore: Your workspace lives at paths like
slug.hintAfter: — use lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external systems and automate workflows. More surfaces will land here as the IAM and ERP roadmap progresses.

marketplace.title: Utilities marketplace
marketplace.description: Tenant-facing utility icons are curated here. Installed controls can be managed in Nexus. New icons are request-only in v1, and self-service is not available yet.
marketplace.tabInstalledDescription: These utilities are already available in Nexus and can be shown on the right rail when space allows.
marketplace.tabAvailableByRequestDescription: Request a reviewed utility icon for your tenant. The Afenda team will triage it through the admin feedback inbox.
marketplace.tabComingSoonDescription: Reserved slots for future utilities. They stay unavailable until product wiring lands.
marketplace.emptyAvailableByRequest: No additional reviewed utility icons are open for requests yet.
marketplace.installedHint: Open Nexus, then use the avatar menu to customize the utility bar.
marketplace.requestHint: Submit a request for Afenda to review and wire this utility for your tenant.
marketplace.comingSoonHint: Planned, but not available for tenant use yet.
marketplace.requestDescription: Self-service install is not available in v1. Submit the use case and the team will review it through the feedback inbox.
marketplace.requestMessagePlaceholder: Describe why {utility} is needed, who needs it, and what workflow it should support.
marketplace.requestSuccessDescription: The request is now in the organization feedback inbox for review.

marketplace.title: Utilities marketplace
marketplace.description: Catalog surface for reviewing installed, request-only, and upcoming tenant utilities.

console.title: Organization loading bay
console.description: Workspace switcher and multi-organization entry point for operators who work across tenants.

quickCreate.title: Quick create
quickCreate.description: Fast entry point for capture and lightweight record creation.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Org-wide broadcast notice center with personal read and acknowledgement state.

insight.title: Lynx
insight.description: Direct link into Afenda’s truth and machine-assist surface.

connectivity.title: Connectivity
connectivity.description: Live browser network status with quick online and offline visibility.

diagnosis.title: Network diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Run a deeper live probe when operators need to confirm browser-to-origin health.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Operator feedback handoff into the reviewed admin inbox.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Reference for fast navigation and operational key commands.

help.title: Help
help.description: Product overview and support entry point for workspace operators.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Switch the interface between light, dark, or system appearance.

density.title: Layout density
density.description: Adjust working density for compact or relaxed ERP layouts.

locale.title: Language
locale.description: Choose the interface language when multiple locales are available.

searchMobile.title: Search (small screens)
searchMobile.description: Mobile-only utility slot for command/search access when screen width is constrained.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Inspect browser storage availability and Afenda-facing keys.

settings.title: Organization settings
settings.description: Direct link to the admin settings surface for governed workspace changes.

messenger.title: Messenger
messenger.description: Operational coordination surface for discussion, evidence, and review trails tied to workspace work.

screenshot.title: Screenshot
screenshot.description: Capture the current workspace or main content view and send one governed PNG into blob intake.

upload.title: Upload
upload.description: Quick launcher for sending one governed file into the current workspace's blob intake.

customIcon.title: Requested utility icon
customIcon.description: A reviewed tenant-specific utility icon wired by the Afenda team after request approval.

integrations.sectionEndpointsDescription: Receive HMAC-signed POSTs when organization events occur.
integrations.sectionImportsDescription: Stage CSV-based bulk operations (member invites today; vendors, SKUs, and contracts later).

imports.createDescription: Paste CSV content. Required columns depend on the chosen adapter (member invites: email, optional role).
imports.listDescription: Most recent ingestion jobs for this organization.
imports.listEmpty: No ingestion jobs yet — create one above.
imports.formSuccessDescription: {total, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}} staged with {failures, plural, one {# validation failure} other {# validation failures}}. Click Run to apply.
imports.rowSummary: {total, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}} · applied {applied} · failed {failed} · state: {state}

endpoints.createDescription: Receive HMAC-signed POSTs when organization events occur. The signing key is shown once on create.
endpoints.listDescription: All endpoints registered for this organization.
endpoints.listEmpty: No endpoints yet — create one above to start receiving deliveries.
endpoints.signingKeyDescription: This is the only time we will display the key. Store it securely; rotating issues a new one and invalidates the old.

botLinks.title: Bot links
botLinks.description: Map GitHub or Discord workspace IDs to this organization for inbound automation.

knowledge.title: Knowledge sources
knowledge.description: Connect repositories and manual chunks; run retrieval evaluation sets.
knowledge.createDescription: Choose an adapter kind and JSON configuration. Manual sources accept ingest from the ERP dashboard.
knowledge.listDescription: Enable sync, edit configuration, or remove sources.
knowledge.listEmpty: No sources yet — create one above.
knowledge.evalDescription: Run a batch evaluation against your indexed chunks.
knowledge.evalHistoryDescription: Latest retrieval quality metrics for this organization.
knowledge.evalHistoryRow: Recall {recall} · MRR {mrr} · {total, plural, one {# case} other {# cases}}
knowledge.runDetailSummary: Recall {recall} · MRR {mrr} · {total, plural, one {# case} other {# cases}}
knowledge.settingsDescription: Hybrid lexical + vector retrieval and optional reranking.
knowledge.byokDescription: Store encrypted provider credentials for this organization.

rail.identityDescription: Canonical profile, email, and linked sign-in methods.
rail.orbitDescription: Personal execution queue, signals, sessions, and linked operational work.
rail.sessionsDescription: Device access and sign-out control for active sessions.
rail.workspaceDescription: Return to the active organization and operating surface.

quickActions.addPasskeyDescription: Open passkey registration in the security surface.
quickActions.signOutOthersDescription: Review and revoke access from other devices.
quickActions.signOutDescription: End this session and leave the personal surface.

overview.title: Personal surface
overview.subtitle: Trusted operator context for identity, workspace access, and security posture.

now.sessionSummary: {count, plural, one {# active session is trusted on this account.} other {# active sessions are trusted on this account.}}
now.workspaceMissing: No active workspace is selected for this account yet.

next.addPasskey: Add a hardware-backed or platform-backed passkey.
next.reviewSessions: Review other device sessions and revoke any that are no longer needed.
next.confirmSessions: Confirm this device remains the intended trusted session.
next.returnWorkspace: Return to {workspace} and continue operational work.
next.openWorkspace: Open your organization loading bay and select a workspace.

overview.recentEmpty: No recent account activity has been recorded yet.

identity.title: Identity
identity.subtitle: Profile, email authority, and linked sign-in methods for this operator.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Sessions, passkeys, two-factor authentication, and recent access evidence.

topNav.menuTriggerTooltip: Account — open personal settings, information, security, or sign out.

Console.subtitle: Select a workspace to continue.
Console.subtitleNoOrgs: Create your first workspace or accept an invitation to continue.
Console.noOrgs: You are not a member of any organization yet.

invites.title: Pending invitations
invites.subtitle: You were invited to join an organization. Accept on the next step (you must be signed in as {email}).

form.title: Create your organization
form.description: Multi-tenant ERP — this becomes your active organization. You will land on the Nexus operational field after creation.
form.slugRules: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores. Leave blank to derive from the organization name.
